name: KT Skylife Co., Ltd.
summary: KT Skylife Co., Ltd., a media company, provides digital satellite broadcasting services in South Korea. It offers skylife satellite broadcasting, Internet, mobile, and sky home appliances, as well as UHD TV and PC. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea. KT Skylife Co., Ltd is a subsidiary of KT Corporation.
